WMT.rationale: Walmart offers a compelling risk-adjusted opportunity with a reasonable valuation (P/E 12.78x at the low end of its 1-year range), strong defensive positioning amid inflation concerns, and solid price momentum (+29.3% 1-year return) supported by consistent fundamental execution.
key_factors: P/E of 12.78x sits at the lower end of its 1-year range (8.4-15.2x), suggesting reasonable valuation
Strong 1-year price return of +29.3% indicates sustained momentum and investor confidence
Defensive retail positioning highlighted in news as 'inflation-resistant stock' amid macro uncertainty
Consistent quarterly revenue around $152B with positive EPS trajectory (Q1 2023: $0.62 vs Q2 2022: -$0.66)

sources_cited.excerpt: 3 Inflation-Resistant Stocks to Buy Right Now

KO.rationale: KO offers modest defensive appeal with strong margins and Buffett backing, but elevated valuation, recent price weakness, and the aspartame carcinogen headline create a near-term overhang that limits upside.

Strong profitability: 22.7% net margin, 36.8% ROE, 58.1% gross margin

Stock down 4.3% over past year while market gained, showing relative weakness

Revenue growth from $7.79B to $7.99B quarter-over-quarter shows steady expansion
